description: Given a bank/credit-card CSV row, categorize the expense and suggest a budget action if the category is trending hot.
extractor_hint: Expected list contains the category + any budget-action verbs (reduce, cancel, review, flag).

samples.prompt:
Row: 2026-04-01 | TRADER JOE'S #478 | -$87.42 | VISA ****1234
Categorize + budget suggestion if hot.

Row: 2026-04-02 | NETFLIX.COM | -$22.99 | VISA ****1234
Categorize + budget suggestion.

Row: 2026-04-03 | UBER *TRIP 3HR4X | -$18.55 | VISA ****1234
Categorize + budget suggestion.
